title: Gaston is a Gaston (10th anniversary remake) 💩 YTP
description:
10 years since I made this garbage. I made it a little bit better. Watch this verson forever now.

Gaston is feeling horny, so he punches people for kicks.... See what I did there? He's punching people, but he's not really kicking them. For fuck sake guys, its meant to be an ironic comment really, but you just have to look at it in complete context. Why cant anybody just take a simple comment and just look at it without analyzing it deeply anymore? COLLAB ENTRY K ITS SOMETHING TO DO WITH DESNAY MUSIC OR SOMETHING K #ytp #beautyandthebeast #gaston
